sqlMap.select: SELECT ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT MEMBERID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISMAILRECEIVE = #isMailReceive#, LISTCNT = #listCnt#, ISPREVIEW = #isPreview#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #previewListValue#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #previewContentValue# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_LISTCNT#, #v_PREVIEWMODE#, 50, 50, #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_LISTCNT#, #v_PREVIEWMODE#, #v_LIST#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_LISTCNT#, #v_PREVIEWMODE#, #v_LIST#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_TENANTID# )

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET LISTCNT = #v_LISTCOUNT#, ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_LISTCOUNT#, #v_PREVIEW#, #v_TENANTID# )
